DtoTypes.Name: CreateBuilderOptions
DtoTypes.Description: Options for creating a distributed application builder from polyglot apphosts.

Properties.Name: Args
Properties.Description: The command line arguments.

Properties.Name: ProjectDirectory
Properties.Description: The directory containing the AppHost project file.

Properties.Name: AppHostFilePath
Properties.Description: The full path to the AppHost file (e.g., apphost.ts, apphost.py). Used for consistent socket path computation across CLI and AppHost.

Properties.Name: ContainerRegistryOverride
Properties.Description: When containers are used, use this value to override the container registry.

Properties.Name: DisableDashboard
Properties.Description: Determines whether the dashboard is disabled.

Properties.Name: DashboardApplicationName
Properties.Description: The application name to display in the dashboard.

Properties.Name: AllowUnsecuredTransport
Properties.Description: Allows the use of HTTP urls for the AppHost resource endpoint.

Properties.Name: EnableResourceLogging
Properties.Description: Enables resource logging.

DtoTypes.Name: ResourceEventDto
DtoTypes.Description: DTO for resource events returned from notification service.

Properties.Name: ResourceName
Properties.Description: The resource name.

Properties.Name: ResourceId
Properties.Description: The unique resource ID.

Properties.Name: State
Properties.Description: The current state text.

Properties.Name: StateStyle
Properties.Description: The state style (e.g., "success", "warn", "error").

Properties.Name: HealthStatus
Properties.Description: The health status of the resource.

Properties.Name: ExitCode
Properties.Description: The exit code if the resource has exited.

DtoTypes.Name: CommandOptions
DtoTypes.Description: Optional configuration for resource commands added with .

Properties.Name: Description
Properties.Description: Optional description of the command, to be shown in the UI. Could be used as a tooltip. May be localized.

Properties.Name: Parameter
Properties.Description: Optional parameter that configures the command in some way. Clients must return any value provided by the server when invoking the command.

Properties.Name: ConfirmationMessage
Properties.Description: When a confirmation message is specified, the UI will prompt with an OK/Cancel dialog and the confirmation message before starting the command.

Properties.Name: IconName
Properties.Description: The icon name for the command. The name should be a valid FluentUI icon name from .

Properties.Name: IconVariant
Properties.Description: The icon variant.

Properties.Name: IsHighlighted
Properties.Description: A flag indicating whether the command is highlighted in the UI.

Properties.Name: UpdateState

Type.TypeId: System.Private.CoreLib/System.Func`2[[Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.UpdateCommandStateContext, Aspire.Hosting, Version=13.2.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=cc7b13ffcd2ddd51],[Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ResourceCommandState, Aspire.Hosting, Version=13.2.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=cc7b13ffcd2ddd51]]

Properties.Description: A callback that is used to update the command state. The callback is executed when the command's resource snapshot is updated.If a callback isn't specified, the command is always enabled.

DtoTypes.Name: ExecuteCommandResult
DtoTypes.Description: The result of executing a command. Returned from .

Properties.Name: Success
Properties.Description: A flag that indicates whether the command was successful.

Properties.Name: Canceled
Properties.Description: A flag that indicates whether the command was canceled by the user.

Properties.Name: ErrorMessage
Properties.Description: An optional error message that can be set when the command is unsuccessful.

DtoTypes.Name: ResourceUrlAnnotation
DtoTypes.Description: A URL that should be displayed for a resource.

Properties.Name: Url
Properties.Description: The URL. When rendered as a link this will be used as the link target.

Properties.Name: DisplayText
Properties.Description: The name of the URL. When rendered as a link this will be used as the linked text.

Properties.Name: Endpoint
Properties.Description: The endpoint associated with this URL. Can be null if this URL is not associated with an endpoint.

Properties.Name: DisplayLocation
Properties.Description: Locations where this URL should be shown on the dashboard. Defaults to .

DtoTypes.Name: YarpForwarderRequestConfig
DtoTypes.Description: Represents forwarder request configuration for a YARP cluster.

Properties.Name: ActivityTimeout
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the activity timeout.

Properties.Name: AllowResponseBuffering
Properties.Description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether response buffering is allowed.

Properties.Name: Version
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the HTTP version string.

Properties.Name: VersionPolicy
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the HTTP version policy.

DtoTypes.Name: YarpHttpClientConfig
DtoTypes.Description: Represents HTTP client configuration for a YARP cluster.

Properties.Name: DangerousAcceptAnyServerCertificate
Properties.Description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to accept any server certificate.

Properties.Name: EnableMultipleHttp2Connections
Properties.Description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether multiple HTTP/2 connections are enabled.

Properties.Name: MaxConnectionsPerServer
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the maximum connections per server.

Properties.Name: RequestHeaderEncoding
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the request header encoding.

Properties.Name: ResponseHeaderEncoding
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the response header encoding.

Properties.Name: SslProtocols
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the SSL protocols to enable.

Properties.Name: WebProxy
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the web proxy configuration.

DtoTypes.Name: YarpWebProxyConfig
DtoTypes.Description: Represents web proxy configuration for a YARP cluster.

Properties.Name: Address
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the proxy address.

Properties.Name: BypassOnLocal
Properties.Description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether local addresses bypass the proxy.

Properties.Name: UseDefaultCredentials
Properties.Description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the default credentials are used.

DtoTypes.Name: YarpSessionAffinityConfig
DtoTypes.Description: Represents session affinity configuration for a YARP cluster.

Properties.Name: AffinityKeyName
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the affinity key name.

Properties.Name: Cookie
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the cookie configuration.

Properties.Name: Enabled
Properties.Description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether session affinity is enabled.

Properties.Name: FailurePolicy
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the failure policy.

Properties.Name: Policy
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the session affinity policy.

DtoTypes.Name: YarpSessionAffinityCookieConfig
DtoTypes.Description: Represents session affinity cookie configuration for a YARP cluster.

Properties.Name: Domain
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the cookie domain.

Properties.Name: Expiration
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the cookie expiration.

Properties.Name: HttpOnly
Properties.Description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the cookie is HTTP only.

Properties.Name: IsEssential
Properties.Description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the cookie is essential.

Properties.Name: MaxAge
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the cookie max age.

Properties.Name: Path
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the cookie path.

Properties.Name: SameSite
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the same-site mode.

Properties.Name: SecurePolicy
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the secure policy.

DtoTypes.Name: YarpHealthCheckConfig
DtoTypes.Description: Represents health check configuration for a YARP cluster.

Properties.Name: Active
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the active health check configuration.

Properties.Name: AvailableDestinationsPolicy
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the available destinations policy.

Properties.Name: Passive
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the passive health check configuration.

DtoTypes.Name: YarpActiveHealthCheckConfig
DtoTypes.Description: Represents active health check configuration for a YARP cluster.

Properties.Name: Enabled
Properties.Description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether active health checks are enabled.

Properties.Name: Interval
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the health check interval.

Properties.Name: Path
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the health check path.

Properties.Name: Policy
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the health check policy.

Properties.Name: Query
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the health check query string.

Properties.Name: Timeout
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the health check timeout.

DtoTypes.Name: YarpPassiveHealthCheckConfig
DtoTypes.Description: Represents passive health check configuration for a YARP cluster.

Properties.Name: Enabled
Properties.Description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether passive health checks are enabled.

Properties.Name: Policy
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the health check policy.

Properties.Name: ReactivationPeriod
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the reactivation period.

DtoTypes.Name: YarpRouteHeaderMatch
DtoTypes.Description: Represents a header-based route match for a YARP route.

Properties.Name: Name
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the header name to match.

Properties.Name: Values
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the header values to match.

Properties.Name: IsCaseSensitive
Properties.Description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the header comparison is case-sensitive.

Properties.Name: Mode
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the matching mode for the header comparison.

DtoTypes.Name: YarpRouteMatch
DtoTypes.Description: Represents route match criteria for a YARP route.

Properties.Name: Path
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the path pattern to match.

Properties.Name: Methods
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the HTTP methods to match.

Properties.Name: Hosts
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the host headers to match.

Properties.Name: Headers
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the header match criteria.

Properties.Name: QueryParameters
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the query parameter match criteria.

DtoTypes.Name: YarpRouteQueryParameterMatch
DtoTypes.Description: Represents a query-parameter-based route match for a YARP route.

Properties.Name: Name
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the query parameter name to match.

Properties.Name: Values
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the query parameter values to match.

Properties.Name: IsCaseSensitive
Properties.Description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the query parameter comparison is case-sensitive.

Properties.Name: Mode
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the matching mode for the query parameter comparison.
